title: Pokopia Forms [Cobblemon]
description: Cobblemon add-on that adds the new Pokopia forms
body:
## A data pack & resource pack that adds Pokopia to Cobblemon!

This is still early, as Pokopia itself is yet to release itself, so this will exclusively add the new forms already revealed.

### Current Additions
- Implements Peakychu a Female ♀ (Electric/Ghost) Pikachu
  - Found in Forest Biomes and Spooky Biomes

**Some custom updates and additions to move pools and abilities are planned to be added to the new forms** !

Installation: Download the attached file, place them in your world's datapacks folder and your resourcepacks folder. Make sure the resource packs are enabled & Cobblemon is downloaded before you report any bugs.
